command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
JOB_ID="job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a"

echo '=== JOB STATUS POLL ==='
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,base64; print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps({'action':'get_job_status','job_id':'$JOB_ID','origin':'test','requested_by':'jose'}).encode()).decode())")
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
j=d.get('job',{})
print('status:', j.get('status'))
print('stage:', j.get('stage'))
wu=j.get('worker_usage',{})
print('3060_calls:', wu.get('windows-ollama-3060',0), '  3090_calls:', wu.get('windows-ollama-3090',0))
for ev in j.get('events',[]):
    print(' ', ev.get('at','')[-8:], ev.get('stage'),'-',ev.get('message','')[:80])
result = j.get('result',{})
if result:
    print('RESULT:', str(result)[:400])
print('artifacts:', list(j.get('artifacts',{}).keys()))
"

echo DONE_1935
